title: HOME MINISTER PU K. SAPDANGA HOVIN RUIHHLO DO CHUNGCHANG SAWIHOIN SIAHAAH ṬHUTKHAWM A NI
content:
4835/2025-2026

Dated Siaha, the 14 March, 2026:Vawiin tlai dar 3:30PM khân DC Mini Conference Hall, Siahaah Ruihhlo do chungchang Pu K. Sapdanga, Home Minister hovin sawiho a ni a, ruihhlo do lam khawih department official bakah tlawmngai pawl hruaitute, MJA aiawh leh khawtlang hruaitute an tel.

Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte, district bawrhsap chuan he hun hi kaihhruaiin, hun chep tak karah Home Minister-in Siaha District a lo tlawh thei chu lawmthu a sawi a, 'Siaha District-a Ruihhlo lo lut hi ram dang (Myanmar) ni lovin District dang aṭanga lo lut a ni tlângpui a, chuvangin luhka pawimawh hmun li (4) ah endikna hmun ruahman a ni' a ti.

Home Minister Pu K. Sapdanga chuan thu sawiin, 'Sawi duh neia lo kal kan nih aiin Ruihhlo dotute thusawi ngaithla tura lo kal kan ni,' a ti. Mizorama tlawmngai pawl hrang hrangte thawhrimna an hriatpui thu leh an tha tihchak chhunzawm zêl chu an tum anih thu Minister hian sawiin, 'Tlawmngai pawl tha thawh tawhna zawng zawngah lawmthu ka sawi a, an tha aia chak hi a awm loh avangin an phurna tichak zawnga hma lakna khawp sum leh pai leh facility hi chu a awm turah ngaih a ni a, District Administration kaltlangin ṭul leh mamawh thlen nise anniin home department lamah an lo thehlut zel dâwn a ni,' a ti bawk.

Tlawmngai pawl leh sawrkar hnathawk chu mipui rawngbawltute ve ve an nih thu leh, lungrual taka thawhho thiam a ṭul thu Home Minister hian sawiin, 'Kan tu leh fate seilenna tläk khaw nuam leh changkang din tumin tun aia ṭang lehzual tûrin kal khawmte a sàwm bawk.

Mizorama ruihhlo luhka bêr ṭhin - hmar lam leh khawchhak lamah uluk taka ven leh hma lâk anih avangin hmun dangah hlet a chhuah hlauhthawn thuah ramri hrul district tlawhkuala, an thu leh hla ngaihthla paha sawihona hlawkthlak tâk neih ṭhaa an hriat avanga tlawh anih thu a sawi.

Sawrkar leh tlawmngai pawlin ruihhlo do kawngah chak taka hma a lâk avangin ruihhlo man a to a, a tiṭhîn pawhin an nghei phah a, khawpui chhung a ralmuangin zana vak rawlai an tlêm phah pawh hi thil ṭha tâk a nih thu Minister hian sawiin, Ruihhlo ngaite hi damlo enkawla enkawl annih hian an damlo dêr nasa a, hlahthlem bîk chi an niin a lang lo. Covid19 lên laiin ruihhlo a lo lut lo va, ruihhlo ngai; an nghei vanga thi an tam phah chuang tlat lo, rilru lama a thawh tel vang ni maiin a hriat. Chuvangin a dim zawng ni lova enkawl a ngamawm anih hi kan ti, a ti bawk.

Pu Manjeet Singh Shankla, SP, Siaha chuan Siaha District Enforcement Force in Ruihhlo do kawnga hma an lakna powerpoint presentation hmangin a nei a, Pu TC. Lalropuia, Assistant Commissioner, Excise and Narcotics in an hnathawh report a pek bakah department leh NGOs aiawh kal ten an hma lakna an sawi bakah an ngaimawh zawng an sawi bawk. Pu VL. Hruaizela Khiangte, district bawrhsap in lawmthu sawina a nei a, ṭhutkhawm tihtawp a ni.

Attachment

title: IRRIGATION & WATER RESOURCES MINISTER LEH ADVISER TO CM (TECHNICAL) TE’N INTERNATIONAL DAY OF ACTION FOR RIVERS VAWI 29-NA PUALA HUN BUATSAIH AN HMANPUI
content:
4834/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, the 14th March, 2026 :Vawiin khan Pu P.C. Vanlalruata, Minister, Irrigation & Water Resources Department (IWRD), etc. chuan IWRD Auditorium, MINECO-ah khawvel puma lui humhalh ni atana hman, International Day of Action for Rivers vawi 29-na puala hun buatsaih chu khuallian niin a hmanpui a. Er. H. Ginzalala, Adviser to CM (Technical) chu khualzahawm a ni bawk. Kumin thupui chu ‘Protect Rivers, Protect People’ (Kan dam khawchhuah nan lui humhalh rawh) tih a ni.

Khuallian Pu P.C. Vanlalruata chuan tui pawimawhzia leh lui tui humhalh that lohvin mipuite a nghawng nasat turzia sawiin, Mizoramah lui tui fim a awm avangin Mizo mipuite an vannei, a ti a. Hetih lai hian lui lian tha a awm loh avangin tui hna siamtu lui te zawkte humhalh a ngaih thu a sawi a. Lui tui chu nunna hnar a ni a, humhalh a nih loh chuan thangthar lo awm zel turte’n tui in tur an nei dawn lo tih a sawi.

Minister chuan sawrkarin lui humhalh nan hma a la mek tih sawiin, Mizo lo neih dan, tlang ram lo neih (shifting cultivation) aia hrisel leh chhehvel tichhe lo zawka loneitute’n lo an neih theih nan sawrkar chuan tung cultivation leh permanent farming a kalpui chho mek tih a sawi a. Vawiin, International Day of Action for Rivers chu ram luite humhalh an nih a, hmangaih leh duat taka enkawl an nih theih nan a tangkai dawn a ni tiin, kalkhawmte chu veina nen hma la a, midangte zirtir zel turin a chah a ni.

Khualzahawm Er.H. Ginzalal pawhın thu sawiin, lui leh luia cheng nungchate humhalh tur chuan lui tibawlhhlawhtu lian berte zinga mi, plastic waste dang bet tur trapping system siam a, plastic waste sawngbawlna lama tui tura mipuite chawhphur an ngai a ni, a ti a. Shifting cultivation tihtlem a, a theih phei chuan tihtawp a, permanent farming nasa zawka kalpui a pawimawh tih a sawi bawk a. Ngialnghet zawk leh chhehvel tichereu lo zawnga economic link road laih dan tur inkaihhruaina felfai tak kan neih a ngai bawk a ni, a ti a. Lui tui humhalh tur chuan mipui, NGO, VC leh sawrkar bakah department hrang hrangte tanrual a, thawhho that a ngaih thu a sawi bawk a ni.

International Day of Action for Rivers hi kum 1997 khan Brazil-a ram hrang hrangte intawhkhawmnaah lui humhalh a nih theih nana kum tina hman tura rel niin, March ni 14, 1998 atanga vawiin thlengin khawvel puma hman a lo ni ta a. Mizoramah pawh nikum, 2025 atang khan hman tan a ni.

Vawiin hun hi Er. Lalrothanga, Secretary, IWRD-in kaihruaiin, mithiam sawm bik, Prof Benjamin L. Saitluanga, Dept. of Geography and Resource Management, MZU leh Er. H. Lalchhuanvela, Chairman, Indian Institute of Engineers, Mizoram State Centre te’n he ni puala thupui hmangin thu an sawi a. Er. Vanlalpekhlua Sailo, E.E.(W), IWRD atangin ‘River System of Mizoram’ tih thupui hmangin presentation ngaihthlak a ni bawk a. Er. K. Hamlet, Chief Engineer, IWRD chuan khaikhawmna thu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

He ni pual hian inelna hrang hrang - reels insiamsiak (Awareness Reels Making Competition), hla inphuahsiak (Poetry Writing Competition) leh lem inziahsiak (Painting Competition) te buatsaih a ni a. Er. L. Malsawma Hauhnar, Superintending Engineer (P&M), IWRD-in lawmman semin, Er. Laldinpuii, Sr. Executive Engineer (P), IWRD-in inelna chungchang a sawizau a. Lawmman latute chu a hnuaia tarlante hi an ni:

Awareness Reels Making Competition (Open Category)

1-na Zothantluanga, Champhai Vengsang

2-na Lalmawizuali, Tuithiang

3-na Lawmsangpuia Ralte, Durtlang Mel 5

Painting on the Spot (College Level)

1-na Macy Lianhlupuii, Pachhunga University College

2-na Lalruatsanga, Hrangbana College

3-na Lalfakawma, Pachhunga University College

Poetry Writing (College Level)

1-na Mickey Lalrinmawia, ICFAI University College

2-na H. Lalrinzuala, Pachhunga University College

3-na Vanlalawmpuia, Mizoram Christian College

College Level inelna bikah Pachhunga University College chu Overall Champion-a thlan an ni.

Attachment

title: HOME MINISTER - IN ZORINPUI TLAWHIN SOLID WASTE MANAGEMENT SYSTEM, LAWNGTLAI TLAWH NGHAL
content:
4833/2025-2026

Lawngtlai, 14th March 2026 :Vawiin khan Home leh UD&PA Minister nibawk Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Zorinpui leh Solid Waste Management System, Lawngtlai te a hmunah kalin a enfiah a. Dr. Lorrain Lalpekliana Chinzah Adviser to Chief Minister, Pu C. Ngunlianchunga, MLA Lawngtlai West bialtu, Pu C. Lalsawmzuala CEM LADC, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga Lawngtlai Bawrhsap leh Pu PC Lalchunglura, Superintendent of Police - ten an tawiawm a ni.

Pu K. Sapdanga chuan Kaladan Multi Modal Transit Transport Project (KMMTTP) hawn a nih hunah Mizoramin kawng hrang hrangin hmasawnna rahbi thar a kai dawn tiin, a taka hmuh a chakawm tawh hle a ni, a ti a. He kawngpui zawhfel a nih chuan sumdawnna lian zawk kalpui niin, Lawngtlai bakah Mizoram hmun hrang hranga chengte tan hmathatna tam tak a thlen dawn a, chhungkaw tam tak tan eizawnna tha tak a siam dawn a ni, a ti. Hmasawnna hian a chhe zawnga zoram mipuite a nghawng a hlauhawm hle tih tarlangin, tun atanga theihtawpa lo in râlrin leh a tha zawnga hman dan tura lo inbuatsaih chu hna hmasa a neih a ngaih thu a sawi a ni.

Home Minister chuan Mizoram tana chhenfakawm leh malsawmna niturin theihtawp chhuah a tul tak zet a ti a. Malsawmna tura sawrkar hmalakna hi mualpohna thlentu a ni thei tih hriatreng a tul a, malsawmna thlentu ni turin sawrkar, NGO leh zoram mipuite inbuatsaih a pawimawh hle tih a sawi. A bik takin Lawngtlai chu chhim kawtchhuah ropui a ni dawn tih tarlangin, Pu K. Sapdanga chuan neitu thinlung pu tur leh a tha zawnga chhawr tura rilru lo inbuatsaih tlat turin a chah nghal bawk.

UD& PA Minister hian 'Solid Waste Management System' Lawngtlai tlawh nghalin hnathawh kal mekte a enfiah a. Lawngtlai khawpuiin bawlhlawh sawngbawlna tha tak a nei tur chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, peih fel a nih hunah chuan Lawngtlai khawpuiin faina leh thianghlimna kawngah nasa takin hma a sawn phah dawn a ni, a ti. Mipuiten an mamwhna hriaa, chak leh tha taka hnathawh bakah a hun taka zawhfel a tul hle a tih a tarlang a. Lawngtlai cmipuiten hman an chak tawh hle tih tarlangin, Pu K. Sapdanga chuan chak taka thawk turin contractor - te a chah nghal bawk.

Pu K. Sapdanga hi Aizawl atangin Pu Jacob Lalawmpuia, Director, UD&PA, Pu Lalrinawma, Traite, AIGP, Pu PC Lalduhtlanga, Joint Secretary, Home Department ten an lo tawiawm bawk a. Home Minister hian vawiin vek khan  Siaha a oana, Ruihhlo Do chungchangah thutkhawm a neihpui leh dawn a ni.

Attachment

title: DELHI-AH CHAPCHAR KUT HMAN A NI
content:
4832/2025-2026

Dated Aizawl, 14th March 2026 :Art & Culture Department leh Delhi Mizoram House te hmalaknain nimin khan Mizoram hmun dangte rualin Delhi-ah pawh Chapchar Kût hman a ni a, Pu Zothankhuma, Additional Controller General of Accounts chu Kut Pa niin Pi Shweta Chauhan, Resident Commissioner chu Kût thlengtu a ni.

Chapchar Kut lawmnaah hian Delhi Mizo Zirlai Pawl Cultural Troupe ten hnam lam chi hrang hrang hmuh nawm tak tak an entir a, Pi Nancy Zothanmawi'n ‘Aw nang kan Lal kan Pathian’ tih hla sain Kût hmangtute a awi a. Pu Alexander V Chongthu, Additional Resident Commissioner-in lawmthu sawiin hun hi a khar a ni.

Delhi-a Chapchar Kut hi Rajya Sabha MP Pu K Vanlalvena te, MADC Chief Executive Member Pu M Laikhaw te, Pu F Malsawma, Ex Minister leh Mizo senior officer leh mi pawimawh thahnem takin an chhim a ni.

Attachment
